CustomField.description: The aggregate operation to perform on the Source Field when computing this user-defined rollup. Valid values are: "MIN" (smallest value), "MAX" (largest value), "SUM" (total of all values), "COUNT" (number of records), "AVG" (average), "BEST_YEAR" (year with the highest total), "BEST_YEAR_TOTAL" (total from the best year), "YEARS_DONATED" (count of distinct years), and "LAST_YEAR" (most recent year with a donation). Must be compatible with the Source Field data type.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The rollup operation (e.g. MIN, MAX, SUM, COUNT) to perform on the source field.
CustomField.label: Field Action
